meaning: adj.闪烁的,摇曳的,忽隐忽现的,一闪一闪的
examples: There was something strange about the flickering blue light.
Several nurses sat before a console of flickering lights and bleeping monitors.
She became distantly aware that the light had grown strangely brighter and was flickering gently.
We can too easily imagine the flickering skin, the snorting and pawing, the frantic runs at the fence.
Lights from some of the moored boats send silver ribbons flickering over the gleaming black water.
